defaultRoutes.purpose: Strong typographic hero, a Selected Work preview that lets a visiting art director scroll the studio's voice in seconds, a capabilities row, a manifesto statement and a measured CTA. The home replaces the LSB pattern of services-then-trust with work-then-voice — the conversion path is recognition, not pricing.

The full selected-work catalogue. One card per project with a label, scope and a representative client name. Replaces the LSB /tjanster page entirely — agencies sell on case work, not service bullet points.

Manifesto plus origin story plus team. A creative studio's about page is rarely a corporate biography — it is the studio's point of view in long form, framed by a manifesto-block and the team that makes the work.
A direct path to the studio. Email, phone, address — informal in copy ('Säg hej') but precise in data so a brand lead can act in two clicks.

optionalRoutes.when: the studio leads with how it works (Discovery → Design → Build → Launch) as a sales tool, particularly common with brand studios and digital agencies
the studio runs a content engine — case write-ups, opinion pieces, behind-the-scenes — and wants editorial space outside the work catalogue
